item.dc:creator: GwendolynCorvid

item.title: Our shrinking middle class coincides with the decline of unions.
item.description:
Just after WW2, 35% of working adults were unionized, giving us an economic boom and vast middle class that lasted 30+ years, which the Republican'ts have been tearing down since Reagan.
https://www.newser.com/story/372927/all-major-las-vegas-strip-casinos-are-now-unionized.html
item.dc:creator: TheCunningLinguists

item.title: Mid-year meme dump (2)
item.dc:creator: TanniShimbeeka

item.title: Your WILD MEME MONDAY Dump To Start The Week Right #719
item.description:
1. "French girl attempting English words" BURGLURRRR OUEOOOOO
2. Untitled Goose Game IRL
3
4. Cats can sleep anywhere, huh
5. My United States of Whatevaa
6
7
8
9. So the middle of USA is a lot of like... empty space?
10. Black Dad
11
12
13. LET ME CLEAN YOU
14. Have you ever been curious if bunnies can swim?
15. Thanks for coming to my TED Meme Talk! P.S. In the last post I want to share a personal project of mine, so if you don't care, please skip it. Anyway, I'm working on a game inspired dark experiment called The Milgram Experiment, where people were asked to torture others to see if they would do when prompted by an authority figure. I want to take that to the next level and the psychological horror of the game should come not from the evil that can be done to you, but from the choices you have to make - torture, kill, spare. Do you think that concept is interesting? Also here is he Steam page for the game, please feel free to wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: How speaking out for trans rights made Pedro Pascal the target of J.K. Rowling's right-wing TERF fan club and their smear campaign
item.description:
I've been seeing some memes on here in the last few days referring to the ongoing smear campaign against Pedro Pascal - mostly to confused comments because turns out most of imgur didn't even know there was a smear campaign going on in the first place (which I love, because it means for so many of us imgur really is our only social media, lol). And I've also seen a couple people say "I don't trust him coz I keep seeing all this stuff about him groping women". So here's everything you need to know about how speaking out for trans rights made Pedro Pascal the target of J.K. Rowling's right-wing TERF fan club and their hate campaign proclaiming "#metoo" concerns while actually trying to discredit a trans ally:
Source: https://www.standard.co.uk/lifestyle/celebrity/pedro-pascal-smear-campaign-anxiety-transphobes-ai-depfakes-b1240406.html [Someone said earlier that the article was paywalled for them (it isn't for me) so I posted the entire thing above. And yes, I tried to remove the stupid arrow overlays but they just would not budge.]
item.dc:creator: ParallelParkingInABurka

item.title: Landing in Chicago - flying over FermiLab
item.description: Pretty good view of the particle accelerator at FermiLab as we were coming in to land in Chicago (ORD).
item.dc:creator: Currahee63

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1432 (new library rules)
item.description:
Let's get this bread (and the poems. Right, @kaeldra ?)
Icthyosaur, Joshua Knüpe (I think?)
Remembering this has been a bit haunting for me.
Dundundun.
Someone has cut clips of the Joe Rogan podcast to the Original Animated Star Trek, and it's *beautiful*
This might be my next cover letter.
I would like to see the Red Jay someday. I didn't get to see it when I visited Greece almost 15 years ago.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "I love you too! Come and take them. Oh Pippin. Oh Pippin. Oh Pippin. Good luck Pippin." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Beirut Explosion was 5 years ago today
item.description: Equivalent to a 1.1kt Explosion
item.dc:creator: DOcelot1

item.title: Dance like you just don't care
item.dc:creator: DOcelot1

item.title: I met the Baldur’s Gate 3 Cast in my Isobel Cosplay
item.description: It was Neil Newbon's (Astarion) idea to kill me (because of course it was), so then I asked if Jennifer English (Shadowheart) and Devora Wilde (Lae'zel) would do the same. Jenn went along with it happily but Devora was like "oh no I don't want to kill you!" it was so sweet lol! They really were all salt of the earth, genuine people and had heart in every interaction with their fans
item.dc:creator: LittleLuckyCosplay

item.title: Recycled memes dump Schwenty Sheven of ??
item.description:
I'm dead.
dog pics always welcome
so deep
Satisfying snek
Auténtico > Cali mex > Santa Fe mex > Tex mex
I would've lost my shit.
This is your herd now.
Fuck you! Teeth don't count!
Dean Winchester.
^ ^ ^ ^
I miss the Harlem Shake vids
Bit faster!
Happy food dance
You can do it!
Tova Tax
item.dc:creator: Arc8ngel

item.title: PTGDump: Memes I Send My Wife Vol. V
item.description:
Hey! I'm dumping again! Hi there!
I am the Leave The Party And Go To Bed At 9 one in the marriage. My wife knows this about me and understands.
This was literally a recent date, only it was a cheeseburger instead of pizza. We had a great time.
I fantasize about this scenario happening in real life.
My wife actually loves people. But she's not really that crafty.
Our cat loves sneaking under the covers.
Well? You heard the man!
Have sent to her more than once.
YEAH CAROL. JEEZ!
*cough*
GABBAGOOL
(We may have had a similar conversation)
My wife is a very itchy individual.
Everyone must enjoy this modern Rice
A stone cold fact, in fact.
We're both just happy to be there.
My wife was the interim CEO of her work for a few months, and is still considered an exec now that she's stepped back down. This is *extremely* accurate.
MEME SYNERGY
Anybody watch the new series?
Less than two months 'till Spoopy Season!
I am a little angry today. So.... Thanks for the FP again, folks! It's good to be back. Did you know I like to shamelessly plug my YouTube channel from time to time? If you're a big fan of bear-shaped bearded men doing silly voices while playing video games, then swing by and check it out. Or don't. I'm not a cop. Youtube.com/@PTGDad
item.dc:creator: PartTimeGamerDad
